items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Mike Brown. George Washington PF/C was drafted 69th in 85 by CHI. After a year in Italy & 2 in CHI, spent 88-93 in UTA backing up Karl Malone. Peaked at 7.7 ppg in 91-92. Also played w/MIN, PHI & PHO thru 97. Per bio: "he'd be 7-footer if he had a neck."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Mike Brown. George Washington PF/C was drafted 69th in 85 by CHI. After a year in Italy & 2 in CHI, spent 88-93 in UTA backing up Karl Malone. Peaked at 7.7 ppg in 91-92. Also played w/MIN, PHI & PHO thru 97. Per bio: "he'd be 7-footer if he had a neck."

items.title: The Indiana Pacers and Jalen Slawson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Slawson averaged 7.3 points on 44.2% shooting from the field and 37.5% from 3-point range, 4.4 rebounds, 2.8 assists, 1.5 steals, and 1.1 blocks in 13 games for Indiana last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Pacers and Jalen Slawson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Slawson averaged 7.3 points on 44.2% shooting from the field and 37.5% from 3-point range, 4.4 rebounds, 2.8 assists, 1.5 steals, and 1.1 blocks in 13 games for Indiana last season.

items.title: Answering a couple Q's here...
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Answering a couple Q's here...

- Technically, the Hawks are now full on Two-Ways because Keshon Gilbert and RayJ Dennis remain under contract

- Two-Way contracts are often (quite) fluid so I definitely wouldn't just assume it'll be these 3 when the season opens

items.title: Everything Changed in Paris.
items.author: Tyler Herro
items.body_excerpt: A week I'll never forget. Paris Fashion Week. Training. The food. The wine. The people. Then everything changed. This is a look behind the scenes during one of the biggest turning points of my career. New city. New chapter. Same work. Welcome to Episode 1 - Shot by Jack…
